stemHtml: For departure, the APU is on, and is supplying the bleed air for all onboard systems. What effect will this have on the take-off distance?

options.a: The take-off distance will be increased as less thrust is available from the engines.
options.b: The take-off distance will be increased as less fuel flow will be supplied to the engines.
options.c: Decreased take-off distance as there will be more thrust available from the engines.
options.d: Decreased take-off distance as there will be increased fuel flow to the engines.
